name: Layered Noodle Bake
recipeIngredient: 1 Can (26 Ounce) Del Monte Spaghetti Sauce With Green Peppers & Mushrooms
4 Italian Meat Loaf Patties, cooked and crumbled
1 Pint Low-Fat Ricotta or Cottage Cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Spread a thin layer of sauce on the bottom of a 13x9-inch baking pan.
3. Arrange half of the cooked noodles over the sauce, covering it.
4. Cover the noodles with half of the remaining sauce.
5. Sprinkle half of the crumbled meat evenly over the sauce.
6. Add a layer of ricotta cheese and half of the shredded mozzarella cheese.
7. Top with layers of the remaining noodles, sauce, and mozzarella cheese.
8. Bake uncovered for about 25 minutes, or until heated through.
